description: A refreshing jog along the scenic Aasee lake path, ideal for clearing your head.

locationInfo.description: A 7 km paved ring around the Aasee lake, flat and popular with joggers year-round.
safetyTips: Watch for cyclists sharing the path
Wear reflective gear in low light

description: Start your day with a calming yoga session surrounded by the palace gardens.
groupSuitability: Suitable for individuals or groups up to 6

locationInfo.description: The elegant baroque palace gardens of Münster University — flat lawns perfect for yoga mats.

description: Spot a variety of bird species around the reed beds and shores of the Aasee lake.

locationInfo.lighting: Open lakeside — best at dawn and dusk
locationInfo.description: The reed beds on the south bank of Aasee are a haven for waterfowl, herons, and migratory birds.

description: Capture stunning urban and nature shots on a guided self-tour of Münster's most photogenic spots.
groupSuitability: Perfect for solo explorers or pairs

locationInfo.lighting: Best in golden hour (early morning or late afternoon)
locationInfo.description: From the Lambertikirche to the Promenade elm trees, Münster offers countless photogenic corners.

description: Practice tricks and cruise around Münster's popular skate park near the Aasee.
groupSuitability: Great for individuals or small groups

locationInfo.description: A well-maintained skate park with bowls, rails, and flat sections for all skill levels.

description: Let your kite soar on the wide open meadows of Westpark — perfect when it's breezy.

locationInfo.lighting: Open parkland with good natural light
locationInfo.description: Wide, flat meadows with minimal obstacles — ideal conditions for getting a kite up quickly.
safetyTips: Avoid flying near power lines or trees
Keep children away from kite lines

description: Start your day with a gentle morning walk along the canal paths and lakeside promenade.

locationInfo.lighting: Open towpath — good light from early morning
locationInfo.description: A flat, traffic-free canal towpath stretching several kilometres north of Münster city centre.
safetyTips: Watch for cyclists on the shared path
Wear layers — mornings can be chilly
Keep dogs on leads near water

description: Use the outdoor fitness equipment along the Promenade for a free, equipment-led workout.

locationInfo.description: Outdoor gym stations installed along the Promenade — free to use, suitable for all fitness levels.

description: Stroll along the harbour or lakeside to enjoy Münster's evening golden hour.

locationInfo.description: The converted industrial harbour is Münster's trendiest evening destination — cafes, art, and waterside views.
safetyTips: Stay on the designated pedestrian areas
Watch children near the water edge
Busy at weekends — allow extra time
